problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins — specifically Autophagy activation to — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
